result.summary: The Epstein files refer to the alleged documents and records related to Jeffrey Epstein's crimes, including a $267m hospice fraud scheme in California. The US Department of Justice has been criticized for its handling of the case.
result.reasoning: I assigned this risk level due to the potential for further revelations about Epstein's crimes and the ongoing investigation into his associates.

signals.text: Pam Bondi's approach to the Epstein files has been criticized by some as inadequate.

best.description: The US Department of Justice discloses all information about Epstein's crimes and associates.

likely.description: Further revelations about Epstein's crimes come to light, but the investigation into his associates continues.

worst.description: The US Department of Justice is found to have covered up information about Epstein's crimes and associates.

sources.name: GNews
sources.title: Pam Bondi and her approach to the Epstein files
